name: Wireless Headphones
description: Over-ear wireless headphones with 20 hour battery life and Bluetooth 5.0. Works well for music and online calls. Comes with a charging cable and carrying pouch.

name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI output, 3 USB-A ports, SD card reader, and USB-C charging passthrough. Plug and play, no drivers needed.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Compact waterproof speaker with 10 hour playtime. Good for outdoor use. Charges via USB-C. Sound is loud for the size.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Compact TKL layout mechanical keyboard with blue switches. USB connection with white LED backlight. Keys are easy to type on for long sessions.

name: Python for Everybody
description: A beginner friendly introduction to Python programming. Covers variables, loops, functions, files and basic data structures. Great starting point for new programmers.

name: JavaScript: The Good Parts
description: Classic book covering the best features of JavaScript including closures, prototypes and functions. Good for intermediate JS learners.

name: Clean Code
description: Book by Robert C. Martin about writing readable and maintainable software. Talks about naming, functions, comments and formatting. Recommended for anyone writing code professionally.

name: Intro to Algorithms
description: The CLRS textbook used in most university algorithm courses. Covers sorting, graphs, dynamic programming and more. Heavy and detailed reference book.

name: Plain Cotton T-Shirt
description: 100% cotton plain t-shirt in regular fit. Pre-shrunk so it keeps its shape after washing. Simple and comfortable for everyday wear.

name: Denim Jeans
description: Classic straight-fit denim jeans. Five pockets, metal button, zip fly. Made with a small percentage of stretch for comfort. Durable and goes with most things.

name: Pullover Hoodie
description: Heavyweight cotton-blend pullover hoodie with kangaroo pocket and adjustable drawstring. Comfortable and warm. Fits slightly oversized.

name: Ceramic Coffee Mug
description: Simple 12oz ceramic coffee mug. Dishwasher and microwave safe. Has a comfortable handle and does not retain smell or stain easily.

name: Adjustable Desk Lamp
description: LED desk lamp with flexible arm and touch dimmer. USB-A port on the base for charging. Three brightness levels and two color temperatures. Good for studying.

name: Spiral Notebook Set
description: Set of 3 college-ruled spiral notebooks, 100 pages each. Durable cover and perforated pages for easy tear-out. Comes in three different colors.
